title: bidens triplinervia var. hirtella
intro: Bidens triplinervia var. hirtella, also known as hairy beggartick or hairy bidens, is a plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Bidens triplinervia var. hirtella include wound healing, reduction of fever, and treatment of digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Bidens triplinervia var. hirtella can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or applied topically to the affected area.
